title: Second Treatise of the Great Seth
description: Christ reveals that he was not truly crucified — a spiritual substitute suffered on the cross while he laughed above.
introduction: Christ reveals that he was not truly crucified — a spiritual substitute suffered on the cross while he laughed above.

translation.text: It was another who drank the gall and vinegar. It was not I. They struck me with the reed. It was another, Simon, who bore the cross.
